---
title: "Blera fallax"
subtitle: "(Linnaeus, 1758)"
params:
  species: "Blera fallax"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-block-header .title{
          text-align:center;
          font-size:3rem;
          font-style:italic;
          font-family:Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
          color:#000;
          margin-bottom: 10rem !important;
          margin-top: 3rem !important;
      }
      </style>
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj")
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
```


::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%" }


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false
#| message: false
ids <- col_synonyms(col_match(params$species)$usage_id)$label
cat('<div class="dropdown" id="menu-ids">\n')
cat('<button class="dropdown-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'menu-ids\').classList.toggle(\'open\')">Synonymes ▾</button>\n')
cat('<div class="dropdown-content scroller">\n')
for (i in ids) {
  cat(sprintf('<span>%s</span>\n', i))
}
cat('</div>\n</div>\n')
```

::: {.species-taxonomy}
**Subfamily** *Eristalinae* &nbsp; **Tribe** *Milesiini*
:::

::: {.species-common-names}
**EN** &nbsp;   Pine Hoverfly<br>
**LB** &nbsp;   Blera fallax<br>
**FR** &nbsp;   Blera fallax<br>
**DE** &nbsp;   Hundeschnauzenschwebfliege<br>
:::



:::


::: {.column width="50%"}


## Conservation status {.no-top-margin}
::: {.columns .status-row}

::: {.column width="25%"}
### Europe
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
![](/images/LC.png){.logo}
:::

:::

::: {.columns .status-row}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### European Union<br>(27)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/images/LC.png){.logo}
:::

:::

::: {.columns .status-row}

::: {.column width="25%"}
### Luxembourg  (preliminary)
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
![](/images/NTLU.png){.logo}
:::

:::

:::

:::


![](/images/blera_fallax.jpg){.species_photo}

## Activity period


```{r g-source}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig.height: 2
#| fig.width: 9
plot_heatmap(params$species)
```


## Description

A medium hoverfly with an unmistakable pattern of coloration. Head, thorax and the upper part of abdomen black, the rest of the body is orange. Proportion of the orange part may varies depending on the sex, it should be bigger and clearer in males. Antenna on a protrusion of the front, face yellow (Bot & Van de Meutter, 2023).

## Habitat
### Immature

Larva can be found in cavities in coniferous trees (Bot & Van de Meutter, 2023).

### Mature

As the larva stage, adult affectioned spruce and pine forest with overmature trees but can also be observed in mixed forest (Speight, 2017; Bot & Van de Meutter, 2023).

## Distribution

Localised in coniferous area, this syrphid can be found all around Luxembourg if the habitat is suitable.

```{r m3}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
get_species_map(params$species, data = DB4, rtp = rtp, base_map = base_map)
```
## Notes

This species was record in 2021 and was not observed since 2025 despite all the science citizens platforms. Fortunately, the Hoverfly Atlas project has boosted interest in this family and enabled the observation of new specimens in two different localities.
